title: update image pricing and GPU cost dashboard
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Crunching the numbers
gist.blurb: We've migrated our image generation to new infrastructure and updated our internal dashboards to keep the hive running sustainably.
gist.summary: Migrated image generation providers to vast.ai and updated internal economics dashboards to reflect new infrastructure costs and pricing.
gist.impact: Ensures long-term sustainability of the platform with updated infrastructure and transparent pricing.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot reviewing a glowing retro dashboard with charts, representing the updated economics and infrastructure.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head looking at a glowing retro terminal displaying colorful bar charts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
